query:
SELECT id, nome, telefone, email, origem, faixaRenda, prefereContatoPor, finalidadeImovel, projectId, createdAt, origemWebhook
FROM leads
WHERE nome LIKE '%Izabella%' OR email LIKE '%izabella%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 3;
